notifications.reason: Codex /review did not pass after 2 attempt(s): The artifact’s listed bot fixes appear present, and the diff is narrow for WebChat dictation, but I found one merge-blocking microphone lifecycle bug. `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` was clean, `git merge-tree --write-tree HEAD origin/main` reported no conflicts, and changed lanes are core/coreTests/docs; the stated `pnpm check:changed` validation is the right scope once this is fixed.
